title: amphilophium bracteatum
intro: Amphilophium bracteatum, also known as the 'Parish's Frigate Orchid' or 'Tiger Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Amphilophium bracteatum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Traditionally, herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which is then used to treat various ailments.
